name: Portobellos with Port
recipeIngredient: Four Ounces Bleu Cheese, Crumbled (One Cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Wipe the caps clean and brush them with a little oil. Place in the oven on a cookie sheet and heat for 3 minutes. Remove from the oven and evenly fill the caps with the walnuts and then the cheese. Return to the oven until the cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
